subject: New Request: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Digitalsverige (public sector) is looking for a senior Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2022-04-08
• Duration: 18 months
• Location: Göteborg (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 900 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• Kubernetes
• MySQL

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
